name: Create CRM Project
body:
{
    "painter_app_project_id": 2453, // Should be removed – validation rule has been removed
    "crm_lead_id": "126", // Valid: nullable, string, max:20
    "street": "9th street", // Valid: required, string, max:255
    "state": "UT", // Valid: required, string, max:50
    "requirement": [ // Valid: nullable, array
        "WP", // Valid: must be one of TX, WP, WF, SE
        "WF" // Valid: must be one of TX, WP, WF, SE
    ],
    "project_name": "Test lead New ", // Valid: required, string, max:50
    "postal_code": "244713", // Valid: required, integer, digits:6 (ideally sent as number, not string)
    "phone": "9574196039", // Valid: required, integer, digits:10, starts_with:9,8,7,6 (ideally number, not string)
    "no_of_rooms": 5, // Valid: nullable, integer, min:0, max:999
    "lead_type": "", // Valid: nullable, string, in: I, E, IE (empty string accepted due to nullable)
    "last_name": "Rahul12345 Test", // Valid: required, string, max:50
    "have_contractor": "Y", // Not defined in validation rules – consider adding if required
    "first_name": "Vrb", // Valid: nullable, string, max:50
    "email": "prajwal.ganeshe@infobeans.com", // Valid: nullable, regex for email, max:50
    "crmsiteid": null, // Currently allowed: nullable, string, max:50 – marked for potential removal
    "contractor_opusID": [ // Valid: required, array, min:1
        "PC00097914", // Valid: string, max:10
        "PC00097914", // Valid: string, max:10
        "PC00097914" // Valid: string, max:10
    ],
    "city": "Pune", // Valid: required, string, max:50
    "address_line_1": "9th streeth", // Valid: required, string, max:255
    "lead_context": "Birla Opus Assurance" // Valid: required, string, max:50 (used for leads from CRM via website)
    // "aid_firm_name": "Test data", // Nullable, string, max:20 //AID only
    // "aid_firm_code": "Test data", // Nullable, string, max:255 //AID only
    // "aid_tsm_name": "Test data tsmname", // Nullable, string, max:100 //AID only
    // "aid_opportunity_id": "ASA9797945", // Nullable, string,alphanumierc, max:20 //AID only
    // "aid_tsm_mobile_no": "9574196038" // Nullable, string, 10 digits //AID only
}

name: Create CRM-Paint-Craft Project
body:
{
    // "painter_app_project_id": null, // Nullable — used for lead-new contractor assignment no need to pass in aid and paincraft
    // "crm_lead_id": "5465465465496689", // Required, string, max:20
    "project_name": "Test lead", // Required, string, max:50
    "first_name": "Test", // Required, string, max:50
    "last_name": "Test", // Required, string, max:50
    "phone": "9574196039", // Required, 10-digit number starting with 9, 8, 7, or 6
    "email": "prajwal.ganeshe@infobeans.com", // Optional, valid email, max:50
    "street": "9th street", // Required, flat no/street, string, max:255
    "address_line_1": "9th streeth", // Required, string, max:255
    "state": "GJ", // Required, string, max:50
    "city": "Pune", // Required, string, max:50
    "postal_code": "395009", // Required, 6-digit number
    "no_of_rooms": 5, // Required, integer, min:0, max:999
    "requirement": [
        "WP",
        "WF"
    ], // Optional, values: TX (Texture), WP (Water Proofing), WF (Wood Finish), SE (Special Effect)
    "lead_type": "I", // Optional, values: I (Interior), E (Exterior), IE (Interior + Exterior)
    "contractor_opusID":["PC00000005"], // Required, array with 10-character Opus ID starting with 'PC' for lead accept multiple max 10 element
    "lead_context": "Paintcraft", // Required  | crm lead :Birla Opus Assurance, AID : AID Firms,  Paint-Craft : Paintcraft

    // For AID and PaintCraft only
    "is_architect": "Y", // Required, values: Y (Yes), N (No)
    "architect_name": "Name", // Required if is_architect = Y, string, max:50
    "architect_mobile": "9879879870", // Required if is_architect = Y, 10-digit number starting with 9, 8, 7, or 6
    "architect_opus_id": "PC00000005", // Required if is_architect = Y, string, max:10

    // Paintable areas — for AID and PaintCraft only
    "total_paintable_area_interior": null, // Optional — required if waterproofing is null, integer, max:1000000
    "total_paintable_area_exterior": null, // Optional — required if waterproofing is null, integer, max:1000000
    "total_paintable_area_water_proofing": 1000, // Optional — required if both interior & exterior are null, integer, max:1000000
    "total_paintable_area_wood_finishes": null, // Optional, integer, max:1000000

    // Site condition inputs — for AID and PaintCraft only
    "cracks_on_wall": "Y", // Required, values: Y (Yes), N (No)
    "is_moisture": "N", // Required, values: Y (Yes), N (No)
    "leakage_on_site": "N", // Required, values: Y (Yes), N (No)

    // Project dates — for AID and PaintCraft only
    "project_start_date": "2025-07-10", // Required, format: YYYY-MM-DD
    "project_end_date": "2025-07-15" // Required, must be after start date

    // AID-specific fields
    // "aid_firm_name": "Test", // Nullable, string, max:20 //AID only
    // "aid_firm_code": "Test" // Nullable, string, max:255 //AID only
}

name: Create CRM-AID Project
body:
{
    // "painter_app_project_id": null, // Nullable — used for lead-new contractor assignment no need to pass in aid and paincraft
    "crm_lead_id": "546546546549668998ss", // Required, string, max:20
    "project_name": "Test lead UAT", // Required, string, max:50
    "first_name": "Vrb", // Required, string, max:50
    "last_name": "Rahul", // Required, string, max:50
    "phone": "9574196039", // Required, 10-digit number starting with 9, 8, 7, or 6
    "email": "prajwal.ganeshe@infobeans.com", // Optional, valid email, max:50
    "street": "9th street", // Required, flat no/street, string, max:255
    "address_line_1": "9th streeth", // Required, string, max:255
    "state": "UT", // Required, string, max:50
    "city": "Pune", // Required, string, max:50
    "postal_code": "244713", // Required, 6-digit number
    "no_of_rooms": 5, // Required, integer, min:0, max:999
    "requirement": [
        "WP",
        "WF"
    ], // Optional, values: TX (Texture), WP (Water Proofing), WF (Wood Finish), SE (Special Effect)
    "lead_type": "I", // Optional, values: I (Interior), E (Exterior), IE (Interior + Exterior)
    "contractor_opusID": [ // Valid: required, array, min:1  // Required, array with 10-character Opus ID starting with 'PC' for lead accept multiple max 10 element
        "PC00000005" // Valid: string, max:10
       // Valid: string, max:10
    ],
    "lead_context": "AID Firms", // Required  | crm lead :Birla Opus Assurance, AID : AID Firms,  Paint-Craft : Painting Services

    // For AID and PaintCraft only
    "is_architect": "Y", // Required, values: Y (Yes), N (No)
    "architect_name": "Name", // Required if is_architect = Y, string, max:50
    "architect_mobile": "9879879870", // Required if is_architect = Y, 10-digit number starting with 9, 8, 7, or 6
    "architect_opus_id": "PC00000005", // Required if is_architect = Y, string, max:10

    // Paintable areas — for AID and PaintCraft only
    "total_paintable_area_interior": null, // Optional — required if waterproofing is null, integer, max:1000000
    "total_paintable_area_exterior": null, // Optional — required if waterproofing is null, integer, max:1000000
    "total_paintable_area_water_proofing": 1000, // Optional — required if both interior & exterior are null, integer, max:1000000
    "total_paintable_area_wood_finishes": null, // Optional, integer, max:1000000

    // Site condition inputs — for AID and PaintCraft only
    "cracks_on_wall": "Y", // Required, values: Y (Yes), N (No)
    "is_moisture": "N", // Required, values: Y (Yes), N (No)
    "leakage_on_site": "N", // Required, values: Y (Yes), N (No)

    // Project dates — for AID and PaintCraft only
    "project_start_date": "2025-07-10", // Required, format: YYYY-MM-DD
    "project_end_date": "2025-07-15", // Required, must be after start date

    // AID-specific fields
    "aid_firm_name": "Test", // Nullable, string, max:20 //AID only
    "aid_firm_code": "Test", // Nullable, string, max:255 //AID only
    "tsm_name": "Test", // Nullable, string, max:255 //AID only
    "aid_opportunity_id": "Test", // Nullable, string, max:255 //AID only
    "tsm_mobile_no": "9586039477" // Nullable, string, max:255 //AID only
}

name: Update CRM Warranty Phase 2
